title: Periodic Ores
description: This mod adds tons of ores, tools, and armor from the Periodic Table to Minecraft.
body:
# Need a super high performance and easy Minecraft server at a good price? Try [godlike.host](https://godlike.host/?aff_id=1323) now!
![GodLike.Host](https://godlike.host/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/godlike_logo_horizontal_join_ua_v1.png)

# Introducing Periodic Ores!

This new mod adds tons of ores, armor, and tools based on entries in the real periodic table. We try to mimic effects of radioactive materials in Minecraft. This mod adds tons of realistic ores you can find in your Minecraft world.

# You can download this mod for Minecraft Forge 1.19.2

Please note, this modpack doesn't contain all of the periodic elements, it will be actively updated to contain all of the elements. You can experience 38 different elements in your Minecraft world now!

# Features

This modpack adds 38 new elements like Sodium, Uranium, Bromine, and lots more. If you are interesting in science, and elements like this, and also happen to like Minecraft, give this mod a try! We hope to continue updating it soon. Thank you!

# Why?

We made Periodic Ores because we wanted to add a unique experience to the modern versions of Minecraft. A mod adding the elements from the Periodic Table is rare to come across for newer versions, so that's where Periodic Ores comes in, it fills in that gap! We hope that you will enjoy this mod as much as we did, we hope to see you enjoying different elements in your world, happy mining!
